name: Apache Kafka
description: Apache Kafka is an open-source distributed event streaming platform for high-performance data pipelines, streaming analytics, and data integration. This script installs the latest stable release in KRaft mode as a single-node combined broker + controller.

notes.text: Runs in KRaft mode — no ZooKeeper required.
Cluster ID, bootstrap address, and paths are saved to /root/kafka.creds inside the container.
Default listener PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092 has no authentication. Add SASL/TLS before exposing beyond a trusted network.
